title_ja: フラッシュ近距離半身・腕前景・黒キャップ×ラインストーン・バンドゥ
title_en: Flash close half-body selfie, arm to lens, black bling cap, bandeau, street beauty
source_notes_ja: 中国語シーン参考を既存ストック形式に整理。泪痣指定はりあめろ（ホクロ禁止）のため省略し、目下のソフトな明るさ・トレンドメイクで代替。
reference_note: English: prompt_en.md. Not mirror shot. Flash makes face brighter than visible body skin.

subject.description: Close-range half-body selfie composition: face dominates center of frame; one arm extends toward the camera creating strong foreshortening. Slight high angle, head tilted, background subdued and low-presence. On-camera flash lights face and rhinestones on black cap brim with strong specular highlights; face reads brighter and fairer than body skin in frame.

expression.overall: Refined youthful beauty selfie, street-luxe polish

face.note_when_no_reference: Smooth nose bridge, delicate proportions; short-video / East-Asian-trend-inspired makeup: defined liner and lashes, glossy lips, highlight on cheeks and nose bridge, soft bright under-eye area (no beauty marks or moles per project rules); clear skin without moles or freckles

hair.color: Light warm brown to dark honey with golden warmth
hair.style: Long hair, high volume, silky sheen, large soft waves
hair.effect: Full glamorous wave movement catching flash on edges

body.frame: Slim upper body visible in crop

skin.visible_areas: Face, neck, shoulders, arms, visible décolletage
skin.tone: Creamy with soft pink undertone on face; body skin slightly dimmer than flash-lit face
skin.texture: Smooth refined, gentle beauty retouch and soft focus, naturally flawless look; clear without moles or freckles
skin.lighting_effect: Hard frontal flash: strong facial highlights; specular sparkle on cap rhinestones and metallic choker

pose.position: Handheld selfie, arm extended toward lens in foreground
pose.base: Slight downward camera tilt, head tilted, intimate large-face framing
pose.overall: Street fashion selfie energy, perspective from extended arm

layered_from_skin_outward: Fitted strapless bandeau or tube top in pale warm beige or soft peach-cream, simple minimal graphic or logo on chest, stretch fabric
Black structured baseball cap worn forward: brim encrusted with reflective rhinestones or crystals catching flash; crown panel with high-shine reflective graphic pattern, street-luxury vibe

accessories.jewelry: Thin black or deep brown leather choker with cool metallic buckle or O-ring and simple small pendant, flash catchlight on metal
accessories.device: Smartphone implied at end of extended arm edge of frame optional

photography.camera_style: Smartphone front-camera flash selfie, fashion editorial polish meets street snap
photography.angle: Slightly above subject eye line, intimate close framing
photography.shot_type: Half-body to bust-up vertical, face very large in frame
photography.texture: Crisp sharp detail on face and cap embellishments, clean edges, mild beauty smoothing on skin
photography.lighting: Direct on-camera flash as key; background falls darker; strong cheek and nose highlights
photography.depth_of_field: Shallow separation, background softly dark and unobtrusive

background.setting: Nondescript indoor or night street blur
elements: Minimal readable context, bokeh or soft shadow

the_vibe.aesthetic: East-Asian short-video beauty trend meets luxury street cap
the_vibe.authenticity: Real flash snap with deliberate styling
the_vibe.story: Quick styled selfie with cap and choker under flash

must_keep: On-camera flash on face and cap rhinestones
Black cap with strong brim sparkle
Fitted pale warm bandeau with simple chest graphic
Thin leather choker with metal flash catchlight
Creamy highlighted skin on face, darker subdued background
avoid_as_positive_style: Not flat even lighting without flash character
Not busy readable background competing with face
Not matte flat skin without dimension
Not beauty marks or moles on skin
